original: a prophylactic designed to repel sydians
context: <<POS:06697810>> ase(e.longName)),e.description='a prophylactic designed to repel sydians'

original: A tubular aerosol canister with the outline of a sydian on it. Once sprayed on, it should detract any sydians from approaching you for a time. It doesn’t feel particularly full; you suspect you’ll only get one use out of it.
context: <<POS:06697863>> ed to repel sydians",e.tooltip='A tubular aerosol canister with the outline of a sydian on i'

original: You take out the aerosol canister and spray yourself all over with it. It doesn’t smell of anything but wet solvent... but then, you aren’t a sydian.
context: <<POS:06698329>> output("You take out the aerosol canister and spray yourself all over with it. It doesn’t smell of anything but wet solvent... but then, you aren’t a sydian.")
